hero.title: Innovate for a sustainable future.
hero.description: Octara was born from a simple vision: to transform technology and make it accessible to everyone.

history.title: Our story
history.paragraph1: Founded in 2023 under the name LMC Group, Octara started as a help community for IT assistance. Our initial goal was to support new developers in their projects.
history.paragraph2: Over the years, we grew by creating LMC Bot which expanded our community, and then diversified by branching into other domains.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Make computing accessible to all, without barriers, while respecting privacy.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We act with transparency and honesty in every project we deliver.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: We strive to promote and contribute to the development of open source software.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Every project should contribute positively to society.

cta.title: Ready to shape the future with us?
cta.description: We are always looking for passionate talent to join our journey and push boundaries.
